title: metros.json — the data contract between the ETL pipeline and the app
description: One static file per ETL run (schema v5). Carries the model's inputs — per-metro observed facts and a global `defaults` block of per-run inputs — plus source provenance. Carries NO model outputs, NO derived values (e.g. price-to-rent), and NO fixed model constants (those live in MODEL). The pipeline is the sole generator. See agent-docs/high-level-design.md.

schemaVersion.description: Semver of this contract. Bumping the major is a coordinated cascade to PIPE and APP.

generatedAt.description: Date the pipeline produced this file (UTC).

sources.description: Provenance for each input, so the app can show honest 'as of' dates.

metros.description: The covered metro set = intersection of good ZHVI, good ZORI, and a state tax rate. Discovered by the pipeline, not hand-picked.

asOf.description: Date or period the input reflects.

slug.description: Human-readable, URL-safe deep-link key derived from the metro's city and state (e.g. austin-tx). Unique within the file.

regionId.description: Zillow RegionID — stable join key across ZHVI and ZORI.

state.description: Two-letter USPS code; selects the property tax rate.

homeValue.description: P0 — current typical home value, USD (Zillow ZHVI).

monthlyRent.description: R0 — current typical monthly rent, USD (Zillow ZORI).

propertyTaxRate.description: Effective annual property tax rate for this metro's state, as a decimal.

defaults.description: The model's per-run inputs (v3). The pipeline fills the values; the schema bounds their shape. Field names are a joint sub-contract with the MODEL segment. Fixed constants (2% anchor, convergence, mortgage premium) live in MODEL, not here.

appreciationSpread.description: Spread over inflation; may be negative.

rentGrowthSpread.description: Spread over inflation; may be negative.

securityDepositMonths.description: Renter's security deposit in months of rent; deposit = securityDepositMonths × monthlyRent. Recoverable (returned at the horizon).

applicationFee.description: Flat rent application fee, USD. Sunk (non-recoverable).

currentInflation.description: Current inflation reading (scalar). May be negative (deflation). Non-dialable; the model gravitates it to a fixed 2% anchor.

mortgageRate.description: Term-indexed origination rates (v5): today's 30-yr and 15-yr rates. The app flattens to a scalar for the chosen preset; the model amortizes the payment itself.
